name: Awesome observability page

links.title: Best practices for monitoring cloud applications
SSL Certificate Monitor
links.description: Open-source SSL/TLS certificate expiry monitoring tool with email alerts for observability of certificate health.

links.title: DNS Propagation Checker
links.description: Open-source DNS propagation monitoring tool with global DNS server coverage for DNS observability.

links.title: Kuberhealthy
links.description: Kubernetes operator for synthetic monitoring and continuous process verification.

links.title: ingraind
links.description: Security monitoring agent built around RedBPF for complex containerized environments and endpoints.

links.title: top
links.description: Allows users to monitor processes and system resource usage on Linux. It is one of the most useful tools in a sysadmin's toolbox, and it comes pre-installed on every distribution.

links.title: htop
links.description: Command line utility that allows you to interactively monitor your system's vital resources or server's processes in real time.

links.title: OpenCensus
links.description: Set of libraries for various languages that allow you to collect application metrics and distributed traces, then transfer the data to a backend of your choice in real time.

links.title: Opentracing
links.description: Vendor-neutral APIs and instrumentation for distributed tracing.

links.title: Openmetrics
links.description: An effort to create an open standard for transmitting metrics at scale, with support for both text representation and Protocol Buffers.

links.title: Micrometer
links.description: Simple facade over the instrumentation clients for the most popular monitoring systems, allowing you to instrument your JVM-based application code without vendor lock-in. Think SLF4J, but for metrics.

links.title: Node-exporter
links.description: Prometheus stack, Exporter for machine metrics.

links.title: Collectd
links.description: The system statistics collection daemon.

links.title: Tcollector
links.description: Data collection framework for OpenTSDB.

links.title: Performance Co-Pilot
links.description: System performance analysis toolkit.

links.title: inspectIT Ocelot
links.description: Java agent for collecting performance, tracing and business data.

links.title: Kamon
links.description: Monitoring applications running on the JVM.

links.title: Netflix Vector
links.description: An on-host performance monitoring framework which exposes hand picked high resolution metrics to every engineer's browser.

links.title: Express State Metrics
links.description: Simple, self-hosted module based on Socket.io and Chart.js to report realtime server metrics for Express-based node servers.

links.title: MyPerf4J
links.description: High performance Java APM. Powered by ASM. Try it. Test it. If you feel its better, use it.

links.title: SkyAPM-dotnet
links.description: Native support agent in C# and .NETStandard platform, with the helps from Apache SkyWalking committer team.

links.title: pktvisor
links.description: Observability agent for summarizing high volume, information dense data streams down to lightweight, immediately actionable observability data directly at the edge.

links.title: duplicacy-exporter
links.description: Real-time Prometheus exporter for Duplicacy backups with live speed, progress, and completion metrics.

links.title: Sleuth
links.description: Spring Cloud Sleuth implements a distributed tracing solution for Spring Cloud, borrowing heavily from Dapper, Zipkin and HTrace.

links.title: Grafana Alloy
links.description: Grafana's OpenTelemetry Collector distribution that unifies logs, metrics, and traces in a single agent; the supported successor to Promtail and Grafana Agent.

links.title: mTAIL
links.description: Windows program that extract internal monitoring data from application logs for collection in a timeseries database.

links.title: kubernetes-event-exporter
links.description: This tool allows exporting the often missed Kubernetes events to various outputs so that they can be used for observability or alerting purposes.

links.title: kspan
links.description: Turning Kubernetes Events into spans.

links.title: KubeEye
links.description: Aims to find various problems on Kubernetes, such as application misconfiguration (using Polaris), cluster components unhealthy and node problems (using Node-Problem-Detector).

links.title: Taurus
links.description: Relies on JMeter, Gatling, Locust.io, Grinder and Selenium WebDriver as its underlying tools. Free and open source under Apache 2.0 License.

links.title: K6
links.description: Developer-centric, free and open-source load testing tool built for making performance testing a productive and enjoyable experience.

links.title: Trunks
links.description: Like every son, is derived from the father Vegeta with some enhanced skills.

links.title: Yandex Tank
links.description: Yandex.Tank is an extensible open source load testing tool for advanced Linux users which is especially good as a part of an automated load testing suite.

links.title: ghz
links.description: Simple gRPC benchmarking and load testing tool inspired by hey and grpcurl.

links.title: Pandora
links.description: High-performance load generator in Go language. It has built-in HTTP(S) and HTTP/2 support and you can write your own load scenarios in Go, compiling them just before your test.

links.title: phantom
links.description: Evgeniy Mamchits' phantom is a very fast (100 000+ RPS) shooter written in C++ (default).

links.title: BFG
links.description: A modular tool and framework for load generation that supports HTTP/2.

links.title: Bender
links.description: Makes it easy to build load testing applications for services using protocols like HTTP, Thrift, Protocol Buffers and many more. Bender provides a library of flexible, powerful primitives that can be combined (with plain Go code) to build load testers customized to any use case and that evolve with your service over time.

links.title: Eventum
links.description: Data generation platform for producing synthetic event streams based on templates, scripts or log samples.

links.title: Vector
links.description: Collect, transform, and route all your logs and metrics with one simple tool.

links.title: Stanza
links.description: Fast and lightweight log transport and processing agent. It's designed as a modern replacement for Fluentd, Fluent Bit, and Logstash.

links.title: Rsyslog
links.description: The rocket-fast system for log processing.

links.title: Apollo
links.description: Faster, more reliable, easier to maintain messaging broker built from the foundations of the original ActiveMQ.

links.title: Ascoltatori
links.description: Pub/sub library for Node.

links.title: Beanstalk
links.description: Simple, fast work queue.

links.title: Disque
links.description: Distributed message broker.

links.title: Eventuate
links.description: A platform for developing asynchronous microservices solving the distributed data management problems.

links.title: Mist
links.description: A distributed, tag-based pub/sub service.

links.title: Mosca
links.description: MQTT broker as a module.

links.title: Nanomsg
links.description: Socket library that provides several common communication patterns for building distributed systems.

links.title: VerneMQ
links.description: Open source software, extendable, and enterprise support is available.

links.title: Grafana Mimir
links.description: Mimir is an open source, horizontally scalable, highly available, multi-tenant TSDB for long-term storage for Prometheus.

links.title: Brubeck
links.description: Statsd-compatible stats aggregator written in C.

links.title: logdy
links.description: Supercharge terminal logs with web browser UI and low-code. It's like jq, tail, less, grep and awk merged together and available in a clean UI. Self-hosted, single binary.

links.title: Last9
links.description: Unified Logs Explorer with search, filters, SQL query support, and OpenTelemetry-native ingestion.

links.title: Augur
links.description: Static analysis linter for OpenTelemetry Collector configurations. Detects misconfigurations, hardcoded credentials, and missing critical components (memory limiters, batch processors) before deployment. Built on OPA/Rego with customizable policies and CI/CD integration.

links.title: VictoriaMetrics
links.description: Fast, cost-effective and scalable monitoring solution and time series database.

links.title: kairosDB
links.description: Fast Time Series Database on Cassandra.

links.title: Graphite
links.description: Store numeric time-series data and render graphs of this data on demand.

links.title: M3DB
links.description: Fully open source metrics platform built on M3DB, a distributed timeseries database.

links.title: Netflix Atlas
links.description: Atlas features in-memory data storage, allowing it to gather and report very large numbers of metrics, very quickly.

links.title: Metric Tank
links.description: Provides high availability and efficient long-term storage, retrieval, and processing for large-scale environments.

links.title: Trickster
links.description: Open Source HTTP Reverse Proxy Cache and Time Series Dashboard Accelerator.

links.title: qryn
links.description: Polyglot monitoring and observability.
links.category: "Meta Projects" (data storage, multi-tenant, aggregation, high availability, etc)

links.title: Thanos
links.description: Highly available Prometheus setup with long term storage capabilities.
links.category: "Meta Projects" (data storage, multi-tenant, aggregation, high availability, etc)

links.title: Observatorium
links.description: This system will allow you to ingest, store and use common observability signals like metrics, logging and tracing.
links.category: "Meta Projects" (data storage, multi-tenant, aggregation, high availability, etc)

links.title: Opstrace
links.description: The Opstrace Distribution is a secure, horizontally-scalable, open source observability platform that you can install in your cloud account.
links.category: "Meta Projects" (data storage, multi-tenant, aggregation, high availability, etc)

links.title: Grafana Tempo
links.description: Open source, easy-to-use and high-scale distributed tracing backend.

links.title: Haystack
links.description: A resilient, scalable tracing and analysis system.

links.title: Apache Solr
links.description: Solr is the popular, blazing-fast, open source enterprise search platform built on Apache Lucene.

links.title: Elasticsearch
links.description: Free and Open, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine.

links.title: ClickHouse
links.description: Fast open-source OLAP database management system.

links.title: Redis
links.description: Multi-model NoSQL database server enables search, messaging, streaming, graph, and other capabilities.

links.title: CouchDB
links.description: Seamless multi-master sync, that scales from Big Data to Mobile, with an Intuitive HTTP/JSON API and designed for Reliability.

links.title: ExplorViz
links.description: Live trace visualization for large software landscapes.

links.title: Flame Graph
links.description: Visualization of profiled software, allowing the most frequent code-paths to be identified quickly and accurately.

links.title: Flame Scope
links.description: FlameScope is a visualization tool for exploring different time ranges as Flame Graphs.

links.title: Grafana
links.description: The first really good dashboard for displaying metrics.

links.title: Skooner
links.description: Simple Kubernetes real-time dashboard and management.

links.title: SLO-Tracker
links.description: A simple but effective way to track SLO's and Error budgets. SLO-tracker can be integrated with few alerting tools via webhook integration to receive SLO voilating incidents.

links.title: Chronograf
links.description: User interface and administrative component of the InfluxDB platform.

links.title: PromViz
links.description: Application that helps you visualize the traffic of your cluster from Prometheus data.

links.title: Uchiwa
links.description: Simple dashboard for the Sensu monitoring framework, built with Go and AngularJS.

links.title: Grafterm
links.description: Visualize metrics dashboards on the terminal, like a simplified and minimalist version of Grafana for terminal.

links.title: Grizzly
links.description: A utility for managing various observability resources with Jsonnet.

links.title: Last9
links.description: Traces Explorer with filtering, span attributes, waterfall visualizations, and SQL ad-hoc querying; fully OpenTelemetry-native.

links.title: Novatec Service Dependency Graph Panel
links.description: A Grafana panel for visualizing a Service Dependency Graph.

links.title: BlueWave Uptime
links.description: Open-source, self-hosted monitoring tool built with React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB, designed to track server uptime, response times, and incidents in real-time with beautiful visualizations.

links.title: Monitive
links.description: Free for 1 service, checked every 10 minutes with unlimited email & twitter alerts.

links.title: UptimeRobot
links.description: Free for 50 monitors, checked every 5 minutes.

links.title: Uptimeify.io
links.description: Website and API monitoring with global uptime checks, instant alerts, and hosted status pages.

links.title: OverOps
links.description: Provides Automated Root Cause (ARC) analysis to reduce the time to identify and fix critical production application errors.

links.title: Freshping
links.description: Free for 50 monitors, checked every 1 minutes. Status pages, monitoring of HTTP (and DNS, ICMP, TCP/UDP), select region of monitoring.

links.title: FlareWarden
links.description: Uptime, content, dependency, and SSL monitoring with multi-region verification and status pages. Free plan includes 15 monitors, 5-minute checks, and 90 days of history.

links.title: Oh Dear
links.description: Uptime, performance, SSL certificate, broken link, and DNS monitoring, with hosted status pages.

links.title: Logstash
links.description: Open source, server-side data processing pipeline that ingests data from a multitude of sources simultaneously, transforms it, and then sends it to your favorite "stash".

links.title: Vector
links.description: High-performance observability data router. It makes collecting, transforming, and sending logs, metrics, and events easy. It decouples data collection & routing from your services, giving you control and data ownership, among many other benefits.

links.title: Kapacitor
links.description: Real-time streaming data processing engine.

links.title: Sloth
links.description: Easy and simple Prometheus SLO (service level objectives) generator.

links.title: Bosun
links.description: Is an open-source, MIT licensed, monitoring and alerting system.

links.title: Last9
links.description: Alert Studio for managing alerts with flexible grouping, routing, and correlation, built on top of OpenTelemetry signals.

links.title: Kapacitor
links.description: TICK stack, written in go.

links.title: Prometheus Alertmanager
links.description: Prometheus stack, Prometheus Alertmanager, written in go.

links.title: X-Pack
links.description: Elastic stack.

links.title: Moira
links.description: Most powerful alerting system, backed by Graphite.

links.title: Alerta
links.description: Tool used to consolidate and de-duplicate alerts from multiple sources for quick "at-a-glance" visualisation.

links.title: Flapjack
links.description: Monitoring notification routing & event processing system.

links.title: Seyren
links.description: An alerting dashboard for Graphite.

links.title: Cabot
links.description: Get alerted when services go down or metrics go crazy.

links.title: NthLayer
links.description: Reliability requirements as code. Generates Grafana dashboards, Prometheus alerts, SLOs, and PagerDuty configs from service.yaml. Includes deployment gates that block deploys when error budget is exhausted.

links.title: Odin
links.description: A programmable, observable and distributed job orchestration system.

links.title: prometheus-am-executor
links.description: HTTP server that receives alerts from the Prometheus Alertmanager and executes a given command with alert details set as environment variables.

links.title: Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
links.description: Documents current knowledge and actions about the risks of failures, for use in continuous improvement.

links.title: Banshee
links.description: Real-time anomalies(outliers) detection system for periodic metrics.

links.title: Project Scorpio
links.description: Log Anomaly Detector.

links.title: Anomaly Detection in Prometheus Metrics
links.description: Prototype for a Prometheus Anomaly Detector (PAD) which can be deployed on OpenShift. The PAD is a framework to deploy a metric prediction model to detect anomalies in prometheus metrics.

links.title: Anomaly Detection Toolkit (ADTK)
links.description: Python package for unsupervised / rule-based time series anomaly detection.

links.title: observability-mcp
links.description: Cross-signal anomaly detection (z-score) over Prometheus metrics and Loki logs, exposed to AI agents through the Model Context Protocol. Pluggable connectors for additional backends, weighted health scoring, Web UI, and an ArtifactHub-listed Helm chart.

links.title: Langfuse
links.description: Open source LLM engineering platform for observability, metrics, evals, prompt management and datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, LangChain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more.

links.title: Arize Phoenix
links.description: Open-source AI observability platform for tracing, evaluation, datasets, experiments, prompt management and playground. Built on OpenTelemetry with Python and TypeScript support.

links.title: ClevAgent
links.description: Runtime monitoring for AI agents — heartbeat watchdog, loop detection, cost tracking, auto-restart.

links.title: Helicone
links.description: Open source LLM observability platform and AI Gateway. One line of code to monitor, evaluate, and experiment across 100+ providers.

links.title: OpenLIT
links.description: OTel-native observability and evals for LLMs and GPUs.

links.title: Langtrace
links.description: Open source OpenTelemetry-based observability for LLM applications.

links.title: Lookspan
links.description: Local-first observability for AI agents. One command (`npx lookspan`) runs a dashboard with traces, a timeline/waterfall view, cost tracking, replay & LLM-as-judge, and datasets. MCP-native, with OpenAI/Anthropic drop-ins and an OpenTelemetry receiver — all data stays on your machine.

links.title: Laminar
links.description: Open-source observability and analytics platform purpose-built for AI agents. Built in Rust for performance.

links.title: Agenta
links.description: Open-source LLMOps platform for prompt playground, prompt management, LLM evaluation, and observability.

links.title: Pydantic Logfire
links.description: AI observability platform for production LLM and agent systems. Built on OpenTelemetry with first-class Pydantic AI support.

links.title: CueAPI
links.description: Open-source observability for AI agent execution outcomes. Tracks verified vs. reported success rates, outcome timeouts, and verification-pending backlogs across scheduled agent work. Self-hosted, Apache-2.0.

links.title: Traccia
links.description: Open-source observability and governance platform for AI agents. Integrates with OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, Langchain, Claude Code, and more.

links.title: Respan
links.description: Full-stack AI engineering platform for tracing agent workflows, evals with custom graders, prompt management, and an AI gateway routing 250+ models. Supports OTLP ingestion and framework integrations (OpenAI Agents SDK, Vercel AI, LangGraph, Mastra).

links.title: Seerlens
links.description: Local-first, .NET-first observability and evals for LLM apps. Live tracing, cost in dollars against a budget, CI-gateable evals, and agent/MCP tool-call scoring. Built on OpenTelemetry with .NET, Python and JS SDKs.

links.title: Heron
links.description: Passive, SDK-free observability for LLM and agent traffic. Reconstructs agent turns and service topology from post-TLS HTTP on the wire — no SDK and no proxy in the request path. Decodes OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini, folds multi-leg proxy hops, auto-classifies vLLM/SGLang/Ollama backends. Single static binary with embedded console, Apache-2.0.

links.title: Voight
links.description: Real-time LLM observability platform. Drop-in SDK wrappers for OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel AI SDK + hooks for Claude Code and Cursor capture prompts, tokens, cache reads, tool calls, cost, latency, and errors. OpenTelemetry-compatible via `otel: true` opt-in.

links.title: OpenLLMetry
links.description: Open-source observability for LLM applications, based on OpenTelemetry.

links.title: MyScale Telemetry
links.description: Tool designed to enhance the observability of LLM applications by capturing trace data from LangChain-based applications and storing it in MyScaleDB or ClickHouse.

links.title: BrowserTrace
links.description: Local-first trace viewer for AI browser-agent failures, capturing screenshots, URLs, actions, model I/O, status, errors, and public-safe HTML exports.

links.title: Manifest
links.description: Open-source real-time cost observability for AI agents. Tracks tokens, costs, messages, and model usage. Self-hostable, privacy-focused, and OTLP-native.

links.title: burn0
links.description: Open-source Node.js cost observability with one import. Auto-detects and tracks per-request costs for 50+ services (LLMs, SaaS, databases) via HTTP interception. Sub-millisecond overhead, local-first with optional cloud dashboard.

links.title: Burnd
links.description: Local-first CLI that reads Claude Code JSONL session files and surfaces cost leaks via pattern detectors (retry storms, tool overuse, repeated reads, thrash, etc.). npx-installable, MIT, zero telemetry; findings export to a shareable report URL.

links.title: agenttrace
links.description: TUI observability for AI coding agents. Tracks cost, tokens, tool failures, anomalies, health, and CI gates across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Aider, and Cursor exports.

links.title: Preflight
links.description: Local-first observability for AI coding assistants. Captures every tool call (reads, edits, commands, searches), tracks USD cost per session/day/week and per model, scores efficiency, and detects anti-patterns (re-reads, blind edits, stuck loops) on a live local dashboard. Offline by default, Apache-2.0; optional New Relic backend for team rollups and alerting. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Zed, Continue.dev, and Amazon Q.

links.title: ax
links.description: Local telemetry for AI coding agents.

links.title: HomeLab Monitor
links.description: Self-hosted dashboard that shows which Docker container is actually holding the GPU - per-container VRAM attribution, not just total utilization. Also covers host vitals, Docker health, systemd services, and multiple machines over SSH. MIT license.

links.title: NVIDIA DCGM Exporter
links.description: Official NVIDIA Prometheus exporter for GPU metrics via DCGM. Kubernetes-native with Helm support, Grafana dashboards, per-process GPU metrics, MIG support, and TLS/auth.

links.title: nvidia_gpu_exporter
links.description: Lightweight Prometheus exporter for NVIDIA GPUs using nvidia-smi. No DCGM or C bindings required. Works on Linux and Windows with auto-discovered metric fields and Grafana dashboard.

links.title: nvitop
links.description: Interactive NVIDIA GPU process viewer with rich Python API. Ships nvitop-exporter for Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards, plus ResourceMetricCollector API for custom monitoring and ML framework callbacks.

links.title: NVTOP
links.description: Task monitor for GPUs and accelerators, similar to htop. Multi-vendor support: NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Apple, Huawei Ascend, Qualcomm Adreno and more.

links.title: servicenow - Cloud Observability
links.description: Gain AI-powered insights to detect and quickly respond to changes in cloud-native and monolithic applications.

links.title: DeepFlow
links.description: Implemented Zero Code data collection with eBPF for metrics, distributed tracing, request logs and function profiling, and is further integrated with SmartEncoding to achieve Full Stack correlation and efficient access to all observability data.

links.title: coroot
links.description: Open-source eBPF-based observability tool that turns telemetry data into actionable insights, helping you identify and resolve application issues quickly.

links.title: robusta
links.description: Unified Kubernetes  monitoring, observability, and operations.

links.title: Odigos
links.description: Observability Control Plane.

links.title: Kloudfuse
links.description: Single unified observability platform for metrics, events, logs and traces.

links.title: Aspecto
links.description: Troubleshoot performance bottlenecks and errors within your microservices.

links.title: Zabbix
links.description: Real-time monitoring of IT components and services, such as networks, servers, VMs, applications and the cloud.

links.title: Circonus
links.description: Unified platform for monitoring and analyzing all of your metrics, infrastructure, and applications.

links.title: Epsagon
links.description: Application Monitoring Built for Containers and Serverless.

links.title: Chronosphere
links.description: Scalable, reliable, and customizable monitoring solution built for cloud-native applications.

links.title: Centreon
links.description: Business-aware and AIOps-ready IT Monitoring.

links.title: catchpoint
links.description: From the edge to the cloud, our proactive observability platform gives you the power to fix problems before your users notice.

links.title: Blue Matador
links.description: Easiest and fastest way to monitor your cloud environments on the market.

links.title: Aternity
links.description: Simplified high-definition APM visibility leveraging Real User Monitoring, Synthetic Monitoring, and OpenTelemetry, that is scalable, easy to use and deploy, and unifies insights across end users, applications, networks, and the cloud-native ecosystem.

links.title: AppOptics
links.description: Continuous monitoring built to scale with your applications for less downtime and lower resource usage.

links.title: Pixie
links.description: Open source observability tool for Kubernetes applications. Pixie uses eBPF to automatically capture telemetry data without the need for manual instrumentation.

links.title: swagger-stats
links.description: API Telemetry and APM.

links.title: Cloudprober
links.description: An active monitoring software to detect failures before your customers do.

links.title: Datav
links.description: A modern apm solution for enterprise, an open-source alternative to DataDog, New Relic, etc.

links.title: Last9
links.description: OpenTelemetry-native observability platform for APM, metrics, logs, and traces, built to handle high-cardinality telemetry at scale.

links.title: SigNoz
links.description: Monitor your applications and troubleshoot problems in your deployed applications, an open-source alternative to DataDog, New Relic, etc.

links.title: Pinpoint
links.description: APM (Application Performance Management) tool for large-scale distributed systems written in Java / PHP/PYTHON.

links.title: Falcon Plus
links.description: An open-source and enterprise-level monitoring system.

links.title: dynatrace APM
links.description: Best-in-class APM from the category leader. Ensure application performance, innovate faster, collaborate efficiently, and deliver more value with dramatically less effort.

links.title: Elastic APM
links.description: Application performance monitoring system built on the Elastic Stack.

links.title: Honeycomb
links.description: Give all software engineering teams the observability they need to eliminate toil and delight their users.

links.title: NewRelic
links.description: Complete view of your applications and operating environment.

links.title: AppDynamics
links.description: Business and application performance monitoring.

links.title: Instrumental
links.description: Real-time application and server monitoring.

links.title: Kamon apm
links.description: Point and click to find the endpoints, database queries, and API calls that affect your user's experience.

links.title: Scouter
links.description: Open source APM (Application Performance Management) tool.

links.title: Netdata
links.description: Troubleshoot slowdowns and anomalies in your infrastructure with thousands of per-second metrics, meaningful visualizations, and insightful health alarms with zero configuration.

links.title: Stagemonitor
links.description: An open source solution to application performance monitoring for java server applications.

links.title: Checkmk Server
links.description: Monitor your entire hybrid IT infrastructure.

links.title: Icinga
links.description: The Icinga stack spans six core strengths that cover all aspects of monitoring.

links.title: Sentry
links.description: From error tracking to performance monitoring, developers can see what actually matters, solve quicker, and learn continuously about their applications - from the frontend to the backend.

links.title: Nagios
links.description: Computer system, network and infrastructure monitoring software application.

links.title: Sensu
links.description: The Observability Pipeline that delivers monitoring as code on any cloud.

links.title: Kieker
links.description: Monitoring, analysis and tool integration.

links.title: Soda Sql
links.description: Data profiling, testing, and monitoring for SQL accessible data.

links.title: Sematext Cloud
links.description: Infrastructure, log, and digital experience monitoring with service and log auto-discovery. Basic plan is free.

links.title: TraceKit
links.description: Lightweight APM combining distributed tracing, live breakpoints, and session replay. Built on OpenTelemetry with SDKs for 13+ languages (frontend to backend).

links.title: Apitally
links.description: API monitoring, analytics, and request logging for REST APIs, with lightweight open-source SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, .NET, and Java.

links.title: groundcover
links.description: eBPF-based observability platform for Kubernetes with logs, metrics, traces, and APM; deployed entirely inside the user's own cloud (BYOC) for data residency.

links.title: CoreDash
links.description: Real user monitoring for Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS, TTFB, FCP) with element level attribution, phase breakdowns, LoAF data, and a built in MCP server for AI agents. EU hosted, GDPR compliant.

links.title: Istio
links.description: Generates detailed telemetry for all service communications within a mesh.

links.title: Kiali
links.description: Observability console for Istio with service mesh configuration capabilities. It helps you to understand the structure of your service mesh by inferring the topology, and also provides the health of your mesh.

links.title: servicepilot
links.description: Modern monitoring platform.

links.title: Instana
links.description: IBM® Instana® Observability is the gold standard of incident prevention with automated full-stack visibility, 1-second granularity and 3 seconds to notify.

links.title: Mackerel
links.description: A SaaS server monitoring service with an intuitive UI, optimized for the cloud era, that fosters a culture of team-based system monitoring/operation.

links.title: Grafana Cloud
links.description: Composable observability platform, integrating metrics, traces and logs with Grafana.

links.title: NexClipper
links.description: Full stack visibility and intelligence for cloud native applications.

links.title: WhaTap
links.description: Provides an integrated monitoring service for DevOps that analyzes application performance issue running on Kubernetes in real time.

links.title: CloudWatch
links.description: Observability of your AWS resources and applications on AWS and on-premises.

links.title: Google Cloud Monitoring
links.description: Gain visibility into the performance, availability, and health of your applications and infrastructure.

links.title: Azure Monitor
links.description: Full observability into your applications, infrastructure, and network.

links.title: Guance
links.description: China local "All in one" observability platform, it can integrate any open source collecting method.

links.title: Alibaba Cloud Logs Service
links.description: Complete real-time data logging service that has been developed by Alibaba Group.

links.title: humio
links.description: Modern log management with streaming observability and affordable Unlimited Plans.

links.title: loggly
links.description: See it all in one place. Dozens of log sources, no proprietary agents.

links.title: SCALYR
links.description: Log analytics - blazing fast at petabyte scale, feature rich at surprisingly low cost.

links.title: splunk
links.description: Extensible data platform powers unified security, full-stack observability and limitless custom applications.

links.title: sumo logic
links.description: Reduce downtime with real-time alerting, dashboards, and machine-learning-powered analytics for all three types of telemetry — logs, metrics, and traces.

links.title: Tencent Cloud Log Service
links.description: Tencent is an internet service portal offering value-added internet, mobile, telecom, and online advertising services.

links.title: Geneos
links.description: Real-time monitoring for all your environments in one platform.

links.title: Levitate
links.description: A Time Series Data Warehouse and Cloud Native Monitoring Solution.

links.title: Dash0
links.description: Modern OpenTelemetry Native Observability, built on CNCF Open Standards such as PromQL, Perses and OLTP with full cost control. Supports monitoring metrics, logs and traces. With dashboarding and alerting capabilities.

links.title: Uptrack
links.description: Uptime monitoring with 30-second checks on the free tier, consecutive-check alert confirmation (multi-region majority vote), hosted status pages, and a built-in MCP server for AI-agent-driven incident triage. HTTP, SSL, TCP, DNS, Ping, Heartbeat, and Cron monitors.

links.title: Rivana
links.description: Storage-fleet monitoring for enterprise SSD/HDD fleets, tracking 10,000+ devices across thousands of hosts to surface latency and performance issues that generic monitoring and SMART alerts miss.

links.title: Yorker
links.description: OpenTelemetry-native synthetic monitoring. Runs HTTP and Playwright browser checks and forwards each run as enriched OTLP (anomaly scoring, third-party attribution, W3C traceparent) to any OTel backend.

links.title: Node.js boilerplate app (JavaScript)
links.description: Docker and Kubernetes ready. Observability (logs, metrics, traces) included.

links.title: Observability Sandbox
links.description: Get up and running with Prometheus, Thanos, Grafana, and more using Docker and Docker Compose.

links.title: Spring PetClinic Sample Application
links.description: Distributed version of the Spring PetClinic Sample Application built with Spring Cloud.

links.title: My Spring PetClinic Sample Application
links.description: My fork of the official repository.

links.title: FastAPI with Observability
links.description: Docker ready. Telemetry FastAPI application with three pillars of observability: Traces (Tempo), Metrics (Prometheus), Logs (Loki) on Grafana through OpenTelemetry and OpenMetrics. Using examplar for cross querying between traces, metrics and logs.

links.title: OpenChainBench
links.description: Open benchmark stack for blockchain RPC providers. Multi-region harnesses scrape live tx-landing, latency and finality metrics; Next.js front-end exposes the dashboards and the raw Prometheus data ([website](https://openchainbench.com)).

categories: "Meta Projects" (data storage, multi-tenant, aggregation, high availability, etc)
